description: concurrency/durability torture for the Ledger-v2 chain — N concurrent durable_append writers must serialize into ONE valid prev-hash chain, zero lost (P1-T09, SV-2)
rules: spawns WORKERS processes each doing APPENDS_PER durable_append calls to one chain file
passes iff zero lost, every line parses, verify_chain ok, contiguous seq (a single serialized chain)
destructive: spawns processes + writes a chain file under the record store
run THROUGH the executor so its own run-ledger can be re-verified by cws-ledgercheck/verify (the recursive SV-2 act)
usage: Optional WORKERS (default 8), APPENDS_PER (default 200), CHAIN_PATH (default RECORD_STORE/torture-chain.jsonl). Output: torture.json with {entry_count, lost, verify_chain_ok, seqs_contiguous, status}.
limitation: Concurrent-append torture; the kill-9 crash variant is exercised by infra.cwp.torture.run_crash_torture (P1-T02) and the unit suite.
